channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-05-22)

item.title: [FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] W.A. Production|VST Alarm is offering Orchid chorus plugin by WA Production as a free download.?NEW

[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] SampleScience|SampleScience May Gift – Cazio Hero virtual instrument plugin for Mac & Win is available as a free download. If the discount doesn’t apply automatically, use the code: FREEHERO26.?NEW
[HOT] Softube|Softube is offering 37% off on Empirical Labs Complete Collection 2.?NEW
